name: Maitong Sunshine Cultural Development Co., Ltd
business: The company provides cultural tourism services (Education Tours and Family Tours) and distributes Chinese cultural and creative products such as tea, alcohol, and gift cards. It also plans to organize and manage arts expositions in fiscal year 2026.
sellsTo: families and youth for cultural tours

catalysts.event: Expand business to include organizing and managing arts expositions
catalysts.sentence: During the 2026 fiscal year, the Company expects to expand the scope of its subsidiary’s business to include organizing and managing arts expositions.
